projects.name: NeMo-Retriever
projects.description: NeMo Retriever Library is a scalable, performance-oriented document content and metadata extraction microservice. NeMo Retriever extraction uses specialized NVIDIA NIM microservices to find, contextualize, and extract text, tables, charts and images that you can use in downstream generative applications.
